scope: First-pass projection-by-projection classification of Paper 34's 28 projections for Riemannian (3,0) → Lorentzian (3,1) signature extension. All classifications by-analyst first-pass; refinement expected when Sprint L1 (modular Hamiltonian) and Sprint L2 (BBB Krein lift) land actual computations.

classification_buckets.TRANSFERS_FREELY: Signature-blind: V/D axes only, no Riemannian volume form, no Mellin transform, no Latrémolière propinquity. Holds at (3,0), (3,1), and any other (m,n) signature.
classification_buckets.WICK_MAP_FREE: Reduces to M1 sub-mechanism of master Mellin engine via the four-witness Wick-rotation theorem (Hawking + Sewell + Bisognano-Wichmann + Unruh, codified Sprint Unruh-pendant 2026-05-10). β = 2π/(surface gravity), 2π = M1 Vol(S¹). Lorentzian reading inherited at no structural cost at metric-functional level; literal operator-system identification is the named open extension.
classification_buckets.EUCLIDEAN_SPECIFIC: Requires Krein-space machinery, Lorentzian-native heat-trace formalism, or Lorentzian propinquity. Named blocker B1/B2/B3. Becomes available at (3,1) only after structural extension.
classification_buckets.MIXED: Parts transfer freely, parts require extension. Specify which sub-mechanisms transfer cleanly and which are blocked.

B1.name: Lorentzian propinquity
B1.scope: Original NCG-mathematics work; estimated 6-12 months. The Latrémolière propinquity used in Papers 38/39/40 is purely Riemannian as of May 2026.
B1.watch_trigger: Nieuviarts 2502.18105v3 (May 2025) twisted-spectral-triple morphism Riemannian → pseudo-Riemannian; may shorten the budget if the construction applies to S³ = SU(2) Camporesi-Higuchi (odd-dim caveat to verify in Sprint L2).

B2.name: Krein-space spectral triple at (m,n) = (3,1)
B2.scope: Bizi-Brouder-Besnard 2018 (arXiv:1611.07062) classification is the most concrete prescription. Hilbert space replaced by Krein space carrying fundamental symmetry J²=I; sign-table replacement on Connes axioms (J², JD, γD anticommutation flip per (m,n) signature).

B3.name: Lorentzian-native heat-trace formalism
B3.scope: Connes-Chamseddine spectral action Tr f(D²/Λ²) is Euclidean by construction; no published Lorentzian sequel. Spectral-action Wick-rotation prescription works at temporal-circle level (Sprint TD Track 4) but not at general operator level.

projections.name: Fock conformal projection
projections.mechanism: Stereographic R³ → S³ uses Riemannian metric on S³ to identify p₀ = √(-2E). The Fock projection is the canonical second-order Riemannian construction (Paper 31 §IV); Lorentzian analog would require a pseudo-Riemannian sphere quotient (S²,¹?) that has no published construction. Blocker B2.

projections.name: Hopf bundle
projections.mechanism: S³ → S² × S¹ (locally) uses Riemannian fibration; Vol(S²) is the M1 Hopf-base measure factor in Riemannian signature. Lorentzian Hopf-base analog requires pseudo-Riemannian fibration (no published prescription). Note: the M1 transcendental signature itself appears in Wick-rotated form via §III.27, but the Hopf bundle as a geometric construction is Riemannian-only.

projections.name: Bargmann-Segal transform
projections.mechanism: First-order complex Euler operator on Hardy space H²(S⁵); linear-affine projection. No Riemannian volume integrated, no calibration π. The π-free certificate at every finite N_max (Paper 24) is signature-independent at the discrete-graph level. Lorentzian extension non-trivial only because of HO continuum content (Bargmann–Fock space); the discrete lattice itself transfers. Honest caveat: HO is itself a non-relativistic construction; Lorentzian HO would require Klein-Gordon harmonic oscillator (well-defined but outside current scope).

projections.name: Stereographic / conformal coordinate change
projections.mechanism: Conformal map between Riemannian metrics; Lorentzian conformal maps exist (Penrose diagram, conformal compactification of Minkowski) but generate different conformal factor structure. Would need re-derivation for (3,1) signature. Marginal MIXED candidate; classify EUCLIDEAN_SPECIFIC pending Sprint L2 BBB scoping.

projections.name: Sturmian reparameterization
projections.mechanism: Algebraic re-parameterization at λ = Z/n, preserves rationality. No metric content, no transcendental injected. Sturmian basis is a re-labeling of the Fock graph quantum-number labels — operates entirely on the algebra A side of Paper 31. Signature-blind.

projections.name: Connes-Chamseddine spectral action
projections.transcendental: √π × ℚ SD coefficients; π^{2k} × ℚ observables
projections.mechanism: Tr f(D²/Λ²) is the Euclidean heat-kernel / Mellin engine (M2 sub-mechanism). Blocker B3. Lorentzian extension would require Lorentzian-native heat-trace formalism; no published prescription. Sub-case k=0 (M1) Wick-maps via Wick rotation §III.27, but the spectral-action operation itself (Mellin of Tr e^{-tD²}) is Euclidean.

projections.name: Camporesi-Higuchi spinor lift
projections.transcendental: half-integer Hurwitz → odd ζ; Catalan G, β(4) at vertex
projections.mechanism: Spinor bundle on Riemannian round S³ (parallelizability via S³ = SU(2)). Lorentzian spinor lift requires Krein-space spinor bundle on a Lorentzian spin manifold; BBB 2018 provides the (m,n) sign table for {J,D,γ} anticommutation but the explicit (3,1) spinor lift on the GeoVac graph has not been constructed. Blocker B2. Note: γ = √(1-(Zα)²) is a single-particle bound-state radial Lorentz factor, NOT a frame transformation (Paper 34 §VIII clarification); structurally inside the Euclidean construction.

projections.name: Wigner 3j angular coupling
projections.mechanism: SU(2) representation theory; signature-blind. Wigner 3j symbols depend only on (l,m) labels and SU(2) selection rules. The angular sparsity theorem (Paper 22) extends to any signature: ERI density at l_max=3 stays 1.44% in Euclidean (3,0), Lorentzian (3,1), or any (m,n) signature. Canonical content of the universal sector (Paper 31).

projections.name: Wigner D-matrix rotation
projections.mechanism: Wigner D-matrix between molecular centers. Pure SU(2) (or SO(3)) representation theory; signature-blind. Lorentzian boosts would introduce Wigner rotations (Thomas precession) but this projection operates on spatial rotations between fixed nuclear centers, which transfers freely across signatures.

projections.name: Wilson plaquette
projections.mechanism: The combinatorial vocabulary (signed incidence, plaquettes, edge Laplacian L₁ = B^T B) is signature-blind and transfers freely (Paper 31 layer-iv universal). The Marcolli-vS = Yang-Mills correspondence and the Wilson lattice gauge action S_W = β Σ(1-Re Tr U_plaq) are Euclidean (Marcolli-vS 2014 / Perez-Sanchez 2024). Lorentzian Wilson lattice gauge has published constructions but not in the Marcolli-vS spectral-triple lineage. The U(1) edge Laplacian / Hodge decomposition (Paper 25) transfers; the SU(2)/SU(3) Wilson dynamics partially transfer.

projections.name: Vector-photon promotion
projections.transcendental: 1/(4π) per loop, identified as S² Weyl exchange constant
projections.mechanism: Photon promoted from scalar 1-cochain to vector harmonic with (q, m_q) labels. The 1/(4π) per loop is the M1 Hopf-base measure on the S² of the Hopf bundle. Same M1 transcendental signature as Wick rotation §III.27. Lorentzian QED on curved background works via Wick rotation at the metric-functional level; operator-level extension to (3,1) requires B2. Honest scope: the 1/(4π) factor inherits the Wick reading, but the photon-field algebraic structure (Lorentzian gauge field as a 1-form on (3,1)) requires Krein extension.

projections.name: Molecule-frame hyperspherical separation
projections.mechanism: Coordinate transformation R^{3N} → hyperspherical; non-relativistic by construction but the angular separation lives entirely on the algebra A side. The piecewise-smooth transcendental in R at the min/max boundary is a property of the Born-Oppenheimer adiabatic curve construction, not of signature. Honest caveat: lifting to a relativistic molecular framework (Dirac-Coulomb-Breit on molecules) would require Lorentzian extension at the spinor level (blocker B2 for the spinor projection §III.7), but the molecule-frame separation itself transfers freely.

projections.name: Drake-Swainson asymptotic subtraction
projections.mechanism: Flow-tier projection (Paper 18 §IV); the intermediate cutoff K cancels in the converged result. Sits in the parametric/central sector of the Paper 31 refinement (Track TS-C §6.3): formally D-touching but functionally universal because the subtraction is along ℝ·𝟙 in the spectral-density domain. Algebraic regularization, signature-blind.

projections.name: Rest-mass projection
projections.mechanism: D² → D² + m²·𝟙 is central (commutes with everything), preserves all Connes axioms, ring-preserving. Already the canonical bridge between non-relativistic and relativistic kinematics; Klein-Gordon dispersion ω² = k² + m² holds in (3,0) Euclidean and (3,1) Lorentzian. Sprint TS-C central-tier sector. The Wick rotation between the two readings is precisely §III.27; mass projection itself is signature-blind.

projections.name: Observation / temporal-window projection
projections.transcendental: 2π·ℚ per Matsubara mode; π^{2k}·ℚ in integrated quantities; Stefan-Boltzmann π²/90 in high-T limit
projections.mechanism: Temporal compactification at finite β = 1/T, Matsubara mode 2πk/β. This is exactly the canonical free-transfer engine: the Wick chain takes the Euclidean S¹_β-circle to the Lorentzian thermal state at temperature T. Hartle-Hawking, Sewell, Bisognano-Wichmann, Unruh all live here. M1 sub-mechanism of master Mellin engine at k=0 with the Vol(S¹) = 2π factor as the universal signature. Already documented at Paper 32 §VIII rem:bisognano_wichmann_reading.

projections.name: Two-body Dirac / Breit retardation
projections.mechanism: Two-body kinematic content at α⁴ via Breit retardation. The retardation kernel itself is derived from Lorentz-invariant single-photon exchange in QED, so its structure is signature-aware. The ring-preserving content over ℚ(α) transfers cleanly. Lorentzian re-derivation would not change the angular-content (Roothaan multipole termination is angular), but would re-express the two-body kinematic factor in a frame-independent way. MIXED: angular-content TRANSFERS, kinematic-content needs Lorentzian re-derivation but the result is the same ring.

projections.name: Nuclear charge-density (Foldy/Friar)
projections.mechanism: Layer-2 input: external nuclear charge radius scalar consumed at projection time. The projection mechanism is consumption of a QCD-internal scalar; signature-blind at the GeoVac side (the framework consumes a number, not a Lorentzian object). Lorentzian-invariant nuclear form factor F(q²) is the underlying object, but the projection at the framework boundary is the scalar r_E.

projections.name: Nuclear magnetization-density (Zemach)
projections.mechanism: Same as Foldy/Friar: Layer-2 scalar input, signature-blind at the framework boundary. The Zemach radius is itself an integral over the nuclear magnetization density convolved with the charge density, which is a Lorentz-invariant nuclear-structure quantity; what the framework consumes is the scalar number.

projections.name: Nuclear tensor multipole (quadrupole, etc.)
projections.transcendental: ℚ via Wigner 3j at angular level
projections.mechanism: Rank-2 nuclear tensor coupling via Wigner-Eckart theorem; pure SU(2) representation theory at angular level. The framework consumes a scalar Q_N; signature-blind. Lorentzian extension does not change the rank-2 angular structure (Wigner 3j) or the multipole expansion termination.

projections.name: Phillips-Kleinman / core-valence orthogonality
projections.transcendental: ring-preserving over ℚ(α); no transcendental injected
projections.mechanism: Pseudopotential projection consuming external core orbitals; signature-blind. The core-valence orthogonality projection operates on the algebra A and the basis decomposition of H, both signature-independent. Relativistic core orbitals (Dirac-Hartree-Fock) would feed in spinor data, but the projection mechanism (P_v = 1 - Σ |φ_c⟩⟨φ_c|) is signature-blind.

projections.name: Multipole expansion / Gaunt termination
projections.transcendental: ring-preserving over ℚ[√(2k+1)]_k; exact termination, not asymptotic
projections.mechanism: Gaunt termination at L_max = 2 l_max is a property of the Wigner 3j triangle inequality; pure SU(2) representation theory. Underwrites Paper 22 angular sparsity and Paper 14 O(Q^2.5) Pauli scaling. Signature-blind.

projections.name: Bipolar harmonic / Drake combining
projections.transcendental: pure rational over ℚ[√(2k+1)]_k (sibling of Wigner 3j)
projections.mechanism: Multi-electron angular content via bipolar tensor coupling; pure SU(2). Internal multi-focal angular-only mechanism; signature-blind. Drake combining coefficients are rational; the J-pattern derivation in He 2³P (Sprint DD May 2026) uses Racah 6j algebra, all signature-blind.

projections.name: Symmetry projection / Young tableau
projections.transcendental: none (integer characters; projector entries in ℤ/N!)
projections.mechanism: Character-based S_N projector for Pauli antisymmetry; pure permutation-group representation theory. Signature-blind. The Pauli exclusion principle is signature-blind (relativistic spin-statistics theorem connects spin to statistics in a Lorentzian framework, but the projector machinery itself transfers).

projections.name: Adiabatic / Born-Oppenheimer projection
projections.mechanism: Scale-separation between fast and slow degrees of freedom; the small parameter m_e/M_n is rest-mass ratio (TRANSFERS via §III.14). Parameter-only at the projection step. Lorentzian extension (relativistic Born-Oppenheimer) is a well-defined construction in molecular QED but does not change the structural projection mechanism.

projections.name: Coupled-channel / adiabatic curve
projections.transcendental: algebraic-implicit at Level 3 (over ℚ(π,√2)); piecewise-smooth at Level 4
projections.mechanism: Coupled-channel ODE system in R; standard mathematical-physics machinery, signature-blind. The algebraic-implicit transcendental over ℚ(π,√2) at Level 3 carries the Euclidean Fock-projection π through, but the coupled-channel projection mechanism itself (Hellmann-Feynman P-matrix coupling, adiabatic curve via per-point diagonalization) is signature-blind. Honest caveat: at finer audit this could be MIXED if the algebraic-implicit π is itself signature-bound (it inherits from Fock §III.1); preliminary classification TRANSFERS pending Sprint L2 detail.

projections.name: Gauge choice (Coulomb / Lorenz / Feynman)
projections.transcendental: gauge-dependent at intermediate-propagator level (1/(4π) per loop in Coulomb gauge = M1 Hopf-base measure); gauge-invariant on physical observables (Ward identity)
projections.mechanism: Gauge choice is a discrete bookkeeping selection. The 1/(4π) per loop in Coulomb gauge is the M1 Hopf-base measure (Wick-maps cleanly). Ward identity ensures physical observables are gauge-invariant; this property transfers from Euclidean to Lorentzian. Lorentzian gauge fixing (Lorenz, Feynman) is the standard QFT construction. Pure-transcendental-only entry; the gauge selection itself doesn't change under signature.

projections.name: Wick rotation / signature change
projections.mechanism: THIS IS THE BRIDGE PROJECTION. By construction, this projection IS the Wick map. Currently encoded at the metric-functional level (structural correspondence). Operator-system-level deepening is the named Sprint L1 target (modular Hamiltonian on T_{n_max}, σ_{i·2π} = identity). Four-witness empirical anchor: Hawking + Sewell + Bisognano-Wichmann + Unruh.

projections.name: Apparatus identity / state-side reduction
projections.variables: ρ density matrix; or β = 1/T Gibbs index
projections.transcendental: von Neumann class; PSLQ-disjoint from master Mellin engine M1∪M2∪M3 (Sprint TD Track 5)
projections.mechanism: State-side reduction operates on density matrices ρ on H. Von Neumann entropy S(ρ) = -Tr ρ log ρ is signature-blind; depends only on the spectrum of ρ, not on the underlying signature of the spectral triple. PSLQ negative (Sprint TD Track 5) verifies that state-side correlation entropies are categorically distinct from spectral-side master Mellin engine — this dichotomy is preserved under signature extension. The apparatus identity S_thermo = k_B · S_microstate(ρ_β) at β = 1/T is precisely the Wick-rotated thermal state, so the temperature-side variable inherits via WICK_MAP_FREE if it enters through §III.15; the ρ-side itself transfers freely.

sequencing_recommendation.leaves_free_transfer: 17 projections (TRANSFERS_FREELY bucket): defer to documentation. Sprint L0 paper edits cover all of these via Paper 31 §8 + Paper 34 §V.E (or §VIII open-question table).
sequencing_recommendation.wick_map_free_already_landed: 4 projections (WICK_MAP_FREE bucket): the four-witness theorem (Sprint Unruh-pendant 2026-05-10) is the published bridge. Structural correspondence at metric-functional level is done; operator-system literal-identification is Sprint L1.
sequencing_recommendation.sprint_L1_gates: 1 projection (§III.27 Wick rotation) at the operator-system level. 4-8 weeks. Does NOT need B2 (Krein lift) — operator-system extension is internal to the existing Riemannian propinquity machinery.
sequencing_recommendation.sprint_L2_gates: 5 projections (EUCLIDEAN_SPECIFIC bucket): Fock conformal §III.1, Hopf bundle §III.2, stereographic §III.4, Connes axioms via §III.6 spectral action, spinor lift §III.7. All gated on B2 (BBB Krein spectral triple at (3,1)). 3-6 months.
sequencing_recommendation.sprint_L3_gates: Sprint L3 (Lorentzian propinquity, B1) becomes load-bearing if the operator-system Lorentzian extension (deepening of §III.27 + §III.7) requires Lorentzian Latrémolière propinquity to take the GH limit at finite n_max. 6-12 months (or shorter if Nieuviarts 2502.18105 morphism applies).
sequencing_recommendation.trivially_closed_at_3_1: M3 sub-mechanism (vertex-parity Hurwitz / Dirichlet-L content in Camporesi-Higuchi vertex sums; Paper 28 §QED-vertex) becomes empty on chirality-symmetric spectrum because the (3,1) signature changes the {J, γ_5} anticommutation table (BBB Table 2 entry (m,n)=(3,1) flips the spinor parity structure). This is a Sprint L2 prediction worth verifying as a structural consistency check.

honest_scope_note: This is a first-pass classification by an analyst, NOT a verified theorem. Each row's confidence rating reflects how robust the classification is. Sprint L1 (modular Hamiltonian computation) and Sprint L2 (BBB Krein lift + Connes axiom audit at (3,1)) will refine these classifications with actual computations. Several MIXED classifications (§III.10 Wilson, §III.16 Breit, §III.25 coupled-channel) may shift to TRANSFERS_FREELY or EUCLIDEAN_SPECIFIC once finer sub-mechanism analysis is done. The classifications use the Nieuviarts 2502.18105v3 trigger-firing literature update of 2026-05-16; whether the Nieuviarts twist morphism applies cleanly to GeoVac is the parallel L2-Nieuviarts-scoping pass and is NOT assumed here.
